purpose: User-facing AWS Braket onboarding checklist so first-round N-12 spec is one-command launchable. Agent-side artifacts (script + verifier + launcher) ready off-repo at /Users/ghost/n12_braket/.

off_repo_artifacts.anima_repo_isolation: HEXA-only policy: no .py committed to anima repo

user_actions_required.name: AWS account
user_actions_required.detail: Sign up at aws.amazon.com or use existing institutional account (preferred for billing isolation).
user_actions_required.prereq: Credit card, email, phone for verification

user_actions_required.name: IAM credentials with Braket permission
user_actions_required.detail: Console -> IAM -> Users -> Create user 'n12-braket-mvp' -> attach AmazonBraketFullAccess policy (or least-privilege braket:CreateQuantumTask + braket:GetQuantumTask + s3 read/write on amazon-braket-* bucket). Generate access key, save key ID + secret.

user_actions_required.name: Enable Braket service (us-east-1)
user_actions_required.detail: Switch region to N. Virginia (us-east-1). Braket console -> Permissions tab -> 'Enable Amazon Braket'. Auto-creates S3 bucket: amazon-braket-us-east-1-<your-12-digit-account-id>.

user_actions_required.name: CloudWatch billing alarm at $50
user_actions_required.detail: Console -> Billing -> Budgets -> Create budget -> Cost budget -> $50/month -> SNS email alert at 80% ($40) and 100% ($50). Honest C3: AWS does NOT auto-stop tasks at threshold; alarm is notification-only. Hard stop = manually cancel tasks.
user_actions_required.honest_c3_note: soft cap; script-side enforces additional $50 ceiling via HARD_CAP_USD constant

user_actions_required.name: Install AWS CLI + configure
user_actions_required.detail: On Mac: `brew install awscli` (or download installer). Then `aws configure` -> paste IAM key id + secret + default region us-east-1 + output json.

user_actions_required.name: Forte 1 device ARN verification
user_actions_required.detail: Braket console -> Devices -> filter 'IonQ' -> click Forte 1 entry -> copy exact ARN. Predicted: arn:aws:braket:us-east-1::device/qpu/ionq/Forte-1 (alt: Forte-Enterprise-1). If different, edit DEVICE_ARN_PREDICTED at top of /Users/ghost/n12_braket/submit_braket.py.
user_actions_required.honest_c3_note: CONFIRM_AT_USER_ONBOARDING — agent predicted but not verified

user_actions_required.name: PRNewswire SC reference tau_2 extraction
user_actions_required.detail: From PRNewswire 2025-03 SC-QC OR-signature article, extract numerical tau_2 value (microseconds). Required for F-N12-1 verifier --sc-tau2-us argument. If unavailable, F-N12-1 verdict = INDETERMINATE.
user_actions_required.honest_c3_note: agent has NOT extracted; user supplies

user_actions_required.name: Pre-flight Bell test on simulator (free)
user_actions_required.detail: Run launcher in dry-run mode first: `bash /Users/ghost/n12_braket/launch.sh`. Confirms script builds 3 circuits, estimates $20.90, no AWS calls.
user_actions_required.expected_output: [cost] estimated USD = 20.90  -- followed by 3 DRY_RUN entries

user_actions_required.name: Live submit (one-liner)
user_actions_required.detail: Export S3 bucket env var, then run launcher in --live mode. See run_command field for exact one-liner.

user_actions_required.name: Retrieve results + verify F-N12-1
user_actions_required.detail: Once IonQ schedules tasks, edit results_<ts>.json to add 'counts' field per entry (from `aws braket get-quantum-task --quantum-task-arn <arn>` then S3 download), then run verifier with --sc-tau2-us <value-from-step-7>.

agent_constraint: raw#9 hexa-only + raw#10 honest C3: agent does NOT submit AWS forms, does NOT create accounts, does NOT touch user credentials. Off-repo .py exists only on local Mac filesystem; not in anima repo.

confirm_at_user_onboarding: Exact Forte 1 device ARN string (Forte-1 vs Forte-Enterprise-1)
Pulse-level delay control on Forte 1 (script falls back to identity-stack proxy)
PRNewswire 2025-03 SC tau_2 reference numerical value
S3 bucket name (depends on user account ID)
AWS account ID and region selection at signup
